intro: A curated set of 3 Design problems frequently useful for Twitter interview prep. Focus on patterns, not brute memorization.

faqs.question: How many Design problems should I do for Twitter?
faqs.answer: Quality over quantity: master patterns with 3 well-understood problems, then expand.

faqs.question: Where should I start?
faqs.answer: Start Easy/Medium in this list, then tackle Hard variants. Pair with the Design topic page and related roadmaps.

seo.title: Best Design Questions for Twitter | AlgoForge
seo.description: Top Design coding interview questions for Twitter. Practice list, FAQs, and pattern links.
